name: Lotus Vaporizer Kit
summary: A handmade olive-wood butane vaporiser using pure convection, for patients who want clean draw-activated vapour with no electronics.
description: The Lotus is a pure-convection flame vaporiser built around a patented cap with six air channels that pull heated air evenly through your herb or concentrate. You heat the cap with a jet lighter for 3-5 seconds, then a steady draw activates vaporisation, producing dense vapour while preserving flavour. Because the chamber only heats when you draw, material isn't wasted. The olive-wood body insulates the device, stays comfortable to hold and develops a unique patina over time. Handmade in Italy from olive wood, stainless steel and glass, it suits patients who want convection performance without any battery or charging.

specs.label: Heating
specs.value: Pure convection via patented Lotus cap

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Sustainably sourced olive wood, stainless steel, borosilicate glass
